payload.label: mirror
payload.long_description: Wall-mounted rectangular glass mirror with a frameless appearance, roughly 1.0–1.2 m wide, mounted above a sink; mirror surface is reflective and shows a white interior door, a tripod-mounted camera and a bedside lamp in the reflection. A small round magnifying mirror is attached to the upper-right of the glass; the left and top/right edges show cropping and visual artifacts/warping (digital reconstruction noise) rather than clean trim. Appears about 1.5 m from the camera.
attributes: small round magnifying mirror attached upper-right
shows reflection of door and tripod
visible sink and faucet at bottom
